$comment: The environments this repo releases — the single source of truth for the release flow. snackbyte-release-flow-action reads only `branch` (is this push a release branch?) and `tagSuffix` (stamped on the derived tag); `name`/`isPublicFace`/`noindex` are for application code. Adding a channel is a one-row edit here and nothing else changes; a push to a branch not listed creates no tag. `dev` is listed ahead of existing — it costs nothing until the branch exists, and means staging works the day it does.
